since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC -4.34% · Gold -3.19% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.94%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.94%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.77%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.77%, CEVA +10.71%, SMCI +10.58%, INTC +10.49%, LSCC +10.44%. Laggards: INOD -6.90%, SPCX -5.34%, IBM -4.71%, WDAY -3.80%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.34% at $181.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
